text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright and I decide against racing in the
Takarazuka Kinen, but arrive at the racecourse to
spectate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After witnessing Silence Suzuka's otherworldly
speed, Mejiro Bright finds herself at a loss for
words.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka's determination to perfect her
running style fills Mejiro Bright with motivation to
keep moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They promise to race together at the autumn
Tenno Sho.
